kind4_legacy_path.bell_state_storage: unreadStore.ts — module-level Set of listeners + localStorage lastRead timestamps

kind1059_giftwrap_path.subscription: ndk.subscribe({ kinds: [1059], '#p': [pubkeyHex] }) — NO author filter (ephemeral outer key)
kind1059_giftwrap_path.unwrapper: unwrapAndOpen() in directMessages.ts — 5-step auth: decrypt outer wrap, verify seal sig, decrypt seal, bind rumor.pubkey===seal.pubkey, verify rumor id hash
kind1059_giftwrap_path.bell_integration: MISSING — kind-1059 gift wraps are NOT subscribed by subscribeDirectMessageNotifications

nip59_sealwrap.unwrapAndOpen: 5-step: decrypt outer with ephemeral wrap pubkey (nip44.v2), verify seal sig (verifyEvent), decrypt seal with authenticated seal.pubkey, bind rumor.pubkey===seal.pubkey (Mallory forgery guard), verify rumor.id matches getEventHash
nip59_sealwrap.buildChatRumor: createRumor from nostr-tools/nip59 — kind-14 rumor with payload JSON

welcome_subscription_duplicate.unwrapGiftWrap: simpler 2-layer nip44 decrypt without seal signature verification
welcome_subscription_duplicate.only_handles: kind 444 (Welcome) and kind 21059 (join request) — NOT kind-14 DMs

idb_layer.loadMessages: get<ChatMessage[]>(storageKey) — returns array, sorted by time on read
idb_layer.appendMessage: serialized per-key Promise chain (appendQueues Map) — prevents concurrent append race; dedup by id

bell_system.display: NotificationBell.tsx reads totalUnread, renders red badge

testing_framework.keypairs_are_shared: Same seeds (alicePriv, bobPriv) used in unit and e2e tests

gaps_identified.gap: parseDirectPayload returns null for bare plaintext NIP-04 DMs from non-nostling clients
subscribeDirectMessageNotifications only watches kind-4 — kind-1059 gift wraps do NOT ring the bell
ContactChat.init does not fetch historical kind-1059 on mount — closed-chat DMs may not replay

RETROSPECTIVE_EXPLORATION.note: NIP-17/59 gift wrap infrastructure fully implemented but bell subscription only watches kind-4. Three clear gaps: lenient parser, gift-wrap bell subscription, historical fetch.
Vitest+Playwright dual stack, deep DM test coverage, NDK+MarmotTS mocking patterns established. Ready to add epic tests.
